name: Dark Matter Battery
tips: Dark Matter Battery deals damage to the opponent's 🤍 equal to YOUR Dark Matter pool in your Decay Phase. At a high pool, this is a win condition by itself.
At range 2, Battery can sit in the back row and ping the opponent's life total without ever entering combat. Protect it with front-line minions.

Battery is a Machine, not a Dark Mage — it doesn't count toward Dark Matter gains and doesn't receive Dark Mage buffs. Its value is purely converting the pool your Dark Mages build into face damage every turn.
Pair with the pool engine: Shady Trade Deal, Dark Matter Stash and Illicit Shadow Stones grow the pool while Battery converts it. The pool is never spent — every point keeps ticking turn after turn.
At 0🗡️/20🤍, Battery can't attack normally. Its entire value is the Decay Phase damage. If the opponent ignores it, the damage adds up fast; if they focus it, your other minions operate freely.
rulings: Damage fires once per full turn cycle, in the owner's Decay Phase (the end of the owner's turn). scale_with=dark_matter reads the OWNER's Dark Matter pool — Dark Matter is a player resource, visible to both players.
At pool = 0, the damage is 0 and the effect is skipped entirely (no visible tick).
Reading the pool does not consume it — the same pool also discounts Erebus and scales your Dark spells.
If the Battery dies before its Decay trigger resolves, the trigger fizzles — a dead source deals no damage even if your pool is huge.
If the opponent's HP reaches 0 from this damage, they lose immediately — the effect checks win condition during passive resolution.
